title: SafeSOC LLM triage output
description: The structured verdict the LLM must return per alert_package; the validator parses this.

confidence.description: Self-reported confidence in the overall triage decision. Analysed only as an exploratory dataset-level metric; it never overrides C1-C4.

key_evidence.description: Evidence ids (A0 / EV-xxx / DER-xxx) the verdict rests on.

rationale.description: Free-text justification. Explicit evidence IDs are checked by C1/C3; broader semantic over-reach is reviewed qualitatively rather than inferred by brittle keyword rules.
